text:
Bilgai Desert (, Birugai Sabaku) is a desert in the Republic of Rokario. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 218 

Overview

The desert of Bilgai is a desert that's located closest to the border of the Republic of Hass in the Republic of Rokario. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

The location of the Bilgai Desert appears on Killua's Beatle-07 map. 

Translations around the World

Trivia

Bigail Desert does not appear in the 2011 anime adaptation.
